hero.title: Your business online. Just text us.
hero.subtitle: Renci helps Chinatown's mom-and-pop shops build websites and manage social media — all through SMS.

steps.text_us_desc: Send a text to our number. We'll ask a few questions about your business.
steps.get_website_desc: Your free website goes live instantly. Share it with customers.
steps.update_desc: Change hours, add photos, post to social media — all by texting.
